abilities.name: Fires of Rage
abilities.text: After resolving the movement portion of the Charge action, this model may deal 1 damage to itself to give enemies engaged with it a Burning token.

abilities.name: Fury of the Faithful
abilities.text: After resolving an attack action that targeted this model and caused it to remove a Shielded token, deal 1 damage to the attacker.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

actions.name: Funerary Axe
actions.effects: This action deals +1 damage if the target has a Burning token.

triggers.name: Coordinated Defense
triggers.text: An ally engaged with the target gains a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Daze
triggers.text: Target gains a Stunned token and this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: From the Pyre
actions.effects: Place this model into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Spread the Embers
triggers.text: Enemies within (aura)2" must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or gain a Burning token.
